MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Expanded Version of the Inventory of Depression and Anxiety Symptoms (IDAS-II)

IDAS_DYSPHORIA.Description: IDAS-II Dysphoria Subscale [10 items]: i.e. 'Distress' - a marker of anxiety & depression

IDAS_WELLBEING.Description: IDAS-II Well-Being Subscale [8 items]: i.e. [low] Positive Emotionality - specific to depression

IDAS_PANIC.Description: IDAS-II Panic Subscale [8 items]: i.e. 'Anxious Arousal' - specific to anxiety

imputation_threshold: Max admissible fraction of missing values used for imputation: e.g. 0 = never imputed, 1 = always imputed; 0.5 = only imputed when <= 50% items were missing from the raw data spreadsheet for a given subscale
